plugins.name: feature-factory-core
plugins.description: Stack-agnostic multi-agent feature-delivery chain: codebase-researcher -> story-writer -> spec-writer -> backend-builder -> frontend-builder -> test-verifier -> e2e-author -> implementation-validator, with human approval gates and a validator loop-back. Includes the feature-factory skill and a secret-scan pre-commit hook.

plugins.name: nextjs-prisma-overlay
plugins.description: Optional stack overlay: conventions for Next.js + Prisma + BullMQ + Resend + Docker/Playwright projects. Enable only on matching repos; sharpens the core agents with this stack's build/test/deploy rules.
